texto: Come on, there's no one there. You want coffee?" Tess asked."Yeah, sure, why not? I'm only on the brink of a nervous breakdown. I don't imagine why caffeine wouldn't help this situation.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Frankie Rose que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “Come on, there's no one there. You want coffee?" Tess asked."Yeah, sure, why not? I'm only on the…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre humor, sarcasm, there, com foco em sarcasm.
